specific_mechanism: Bone remodels itself in response to mechanical stress (Wolff's law) — osteoclasts resorb under-loaded bone, osteoblasts deposit new bone along stress trajectories
llm_application: LLM parameter 'remodeling': low-utilization parameters get pruned (osteoclast analog), high-utilization parameters get duplicated/strengthened (osteoblast analog); net effect = stress-aligned parameter topology.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes orthopedics basin-stability mapping as proposed.
